verses.translation: Om, we worship the three-eyed Lord (Shiva)
Who is fragrant and who nourishes and sustains all life
Just as a ripe cucumber is liberated from its bond to the vine
May He liberate us from death and guide us to immortality
Om, we worship the three-eyed Lord (Shiva)
Who is fragrant and who nourishes and sustains all life
